sourceMovie.title: Cold Pursuit
sourceMovie.whyPeopleLoveIt: Cold Pursuit works as a crime movie with a point of view—fans quote moments, but they also argue about what the film is actually saying about power, desire, or survival. The crime and action blend is the engine: it lets the film shift registers without feeling like two different movies stitched together.

recommendations.title: Kill Bill: Vol. 1
recommendations.whyYoullLoveIt: If Cold Pursuit clicked for you, Kill Bill: Vol. 1 (2003) is a strong next stop: both trade in crime and action, with momentum and clean stakes. Expect a different story, but a similar willingness to go big when the moment demands it.

recommendations.title: Léon: The Professional
recommendations.whyYoullLoveIt: If Cold Pursuit clicked for you, Léon: The Professional (1994) is a strong next stop: both trade in crime and action, with momentum and clean stakes. Expect a different story, but a similar willingness to go big when the moment demands it.

faq.question: What should I watch after Cold Pursuit?
faq.answer: Try Kill Bill: Vol. 1, Léon: The Professional, The Jackal—each shares DNA with Cold Pursuit while changing the setting enough to feel fresh.

faq.question: What genre is Cold Pursuit?
faq.answer: Cold Pursuit (2019) is best described as Crime, Action. Stores and algorithms use different labels, but that mix is what fans actually recognize on a rewatch.

faq.question: Is Cold Pursuit part of a franchise?
faq.answer: Yes—it's part of the "Cold Pursuit Collection" storyline. You can enjoy it standalone, but sequels and tie-ins build on characters and continuity established here.
